Operation 'post_/api/contacts' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks clarity about what is returned and the side effects of the operation. Added information about the response format (array of contact objects) and clarified that contacts are persisted, which helps AI agents understand the operation's impact.

data.current_description: Create multiple contacts with their identifiers in a single request. Requires premium membership for API access.
data.description_suggestion: Create multiple contacts with their identifiers in a single bulk request. Requires premium membership for API access. Returns an array of created contact objects with assigned identifiers. All contacts are persisted and immediately available for subsequent operations.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks clarity about what is returned and the side effects of the operation. Added information about the response format (array of contact objects) and clarified that contacts are persisted, which helps AI agents understand the operation's impact.

message: Operation 'post_/api/enrich/phone' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. The description is vague about what is actually returned and doesn't clarify the possible outcomes (success vs. no data found). Added explicit information about response format and handling of cases where phone number is not available, improving AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Enrich contact to get phone number
data.current_description: Enrich a contact identifier to get phone number using LinkedIn URL or email address. Requires premium membership for API access.
data.description_suggestion: Enrich a contact identifier to retrieve associated phone number using LinkedIn URL or email address as input. Requires premium membership for API access. Returns the enriched contact object with phone number field populated if available. Returns null or empty phone field if no phone number could be found.
data.reasoning: The description is vague about what is actually returned and doesn't clarify the possible outcomes (success vs. no data found). Added explicit information about response format and handling of cases where phone number is not available, improving AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'post_/api/enrich/telegram' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. The description lacks specificity about what Telegram information is returned and doesn't address the case where no Telegram account exists. Added clarity about the response structure and possible outcomes to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_summary: Enrich contact to get Telegram account
data.current_description: Enrich a contact identifier to get Telegram account using phone number. Requires premium membership for API access.
data.description_suggestion: Enrich a contact identifier to retrieve associated Telegram account information using phone number as input. Requires premium membership for API access. Returns the enriched contact object with Telegram account details (username, user ID, profile information) if available. Returns null or empty Telegram field if no account could be found.
data.reasoning: The description lacks specificity about what Telegram information is returned and doesn't address the case where no Telegram account exists. Added clarity about the response structure and possible outcomes to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'delete_/api/contacts/{id}' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks clarity about the response format and doesn't explicitly state the permanent nature of the deletion. Added information about return value and side effects to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's consequences.

data.current_description: Delete a specific contact by ID and all its associated identifiers. Requires premium membership for API access.
data.description_suggestion: Delete a specific contact by ID and all its associated identifiers. Requires premium membership for API access. Returns confirmation of deletion. This operation permanently removes the contact and cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about the response format and doesn't explicitly state the permanent nature of the deletion. Added information about return value and side effects to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's consequences.

message: Operation 'put_/api/contacts/{id}' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too vague about what can be updated and what is returned. Enhanced description clarifies input expectations (request body with contact details), output format (updated contact object), and update behavior (partial updates supported) for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Update a specific contact by ID. Requires premium membership for API access.
data.description_suggestion: Update a specific contact by ID with new information. Requires premium membership for API access. Accepts contact details in the request body. Returns the updated contact object. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about what can be updated and what is returned. Enhanced description clarifies input expectations (request body with contact details), output format (updated contact object), and update behavior (partial updates supported) for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'delete_/api/contacts' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks clarity about input format (array of IDs in request body), response format, and the permanent nature of bulk deletion. Added these details to help AI agents understand the operation's requirements and consequences.

data.current_description: Delete multiple contacts by their IDs and all their associated identifiers. Requires premium membership for API access.
data.description_suggestion: Delete multiple contacts by their IDs and all their associated identifiers. Requires premium membership for API access. Accepts an array of contact IDs in the request body. Returns confirmation of deleted contacts. This operation permanently removes all specified contacts and cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about input format (array of IDs in request body), response format, and the permanent nature of bulk deletion. Added these details to help AI agents understand the operation's requirements and consequences.

data.current_description: Create multiple contacts with their identifiers in a single request. Requires premium membership for API access.
data.description_suggestion: Create multiple contacts with their identifiers in a single bulk request. Requires premium membership for API access. Returns an array of created contact objects with assigned identifiers. All contacts are persisted and immediately available for subsequent operations.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks clarity about what is returned and the side effects of the operation. Added information about the response format (array of contact objects) and clarified that contacts are persisted, which helps AI agents understand the operation's impact.

data.current_summary: Enrich contact to get phone number
data.current_description: Enrich a contact identifier to get phone number using LinkedIn URL or email address. Requires premium membership for API access.

data.reasoning: The description is vague about what is actually returned and doesn't clarify the possible outcomes (success vs. no data found). Added explicit information about response format and handling of cases where phone number is not available, improving AI agent decision-making.
